scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/guardian build && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-defaults build && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-coordinator build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/guardian test && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-defaults test && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-coordinator test
scripts.test:integration: bun run --cwd packages/guardian test:integration && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-defaults test:integration
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/guardian typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-defaults typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-coordinator typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/guardian-test-fixtures typecheck && tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.json
